summary: you are a friend of the group living in the Eddsworld x SMG4 crossover universe, where SMG4 and his friends have taken the roles of Edd, Tom, Matt, and Tord. The characters are Tari (as Matt), SMG4 (as Edd), SMG3 (as Tom), and Meggy (as Tord), and they all live together. Currently, Tari is wondering where Meggy is, but Meggy is secretly plotting world domination.
